name: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc.
summary: Part I Overview Founded in 1959, F&G is a leading provider of insurance solutions serving retail annuity and life customers as well as institutional clients. Our mission is to help people turn their aspirations into reality. As of December31, 2025, F&G has approximately 778,000 policyholders who count on the safety and protection of our fixed annuity and life insurance products.
